# Function to generate volcano plot from a DESeqDataSet
make_volcano_plot <- function(dds_obj, name) {
  res <- results(dds_obj)
  volcano_df <- as.data.frame(res)
  volcano_df$gene <- rownames(volcano_df)
  volcano_df$logFC <- volcano_df$log2FoldChange
  volcano_df$adjPValue <- volcano_df$padj
  
  # classify genes
  volcano_df$de <- "NA"
  volcano_df$de[volcano_df$logFC >= 1 & volcano_df$adjPValue < 0.05] <- "UP"
  volcano_df$de[volcano_df$logFC <= -1 & volcano_df$adjPValue < 0.05] <- "DN"
  volcano_df$deLab <- ifelse(volcano_df$de != "NA", volcano_df$gene, NA)
  
  # build plot
  ggplot(data = volcano_df,
         aes(x = -log10(adjPValue),
             y = logFC,
             color = de,
             label = deLab)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "black", linetype = 3) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(-1, 1), col = "black", linetype = 3) +
    # geom_text_repel(
    #   data = subset(volcano_df, abs(logFC) >= 2 & adjPValue < 1e-5),
    #   segment.colour = "black",
    #   segment.linetype = 3,
    #   position = position_nudge_center(x = 0, y = 0.15, center_y = 0, center_x = 15),
    #   min.segment.length = 0,
    #   max.overlaps = 18) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("DN" = "darkblue", "NA" = "grey75", "UP" = "red")) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black"),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, colour = "black"),
      panel.border = element_blank(),
      text = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
      #axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      aspect.ratio = 1,
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, color = "black")
    ) +
    labs(subtitle = paste0(name," vs others")) +
    xlab("") + ylab("")
}

# Apply to each item in dds_list
volcano_plot_list <- lapply(names(dds_list), function(n) {
  make_volcano_plot(dds_list[[n]], name = n)
})
names(volcano_plot_list) <- names(dds_list)  # Name each plot by contrast name


grid_patchwork <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
  volcano_plot_list[c('ATI/Endo', 'Alv. FB/immune', 'Plasma', 'SMC', 'ATII', 'Immune', 'Airway', 'Adv. FB', 'Perib. FB', 'Alv. macro', 'Macro', 'B')], ncol = 4, nrow = 3, axis_titles = "collect"
) 

print(grid_patchwork)

dir.create("figs", showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave("figs/volcano_3x4_reordered.pdf",  plot = grid_patchwork,  height = 8, width = 12, bg = "transparent")
